name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and multiple loan products including installment and title loans at physical store locations.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a network of physical store locations offering financial services to consumers who need fast cash access and alternative financial products. The company has established a multi-service model that extends beyond traditional payday lending to include check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and tax preparation services. Their primary loan offerings include installment loans and title loans, marketed as emergency cash solutions with same-day or next-day funding capabilities. ACE maintains both phone and online customer service channels, with separate departments for general inquiries and online loan operations.

The company's service portfolio spans check cashing, installment loans, title loans, prepaid cards, bill payment processing, business services, money transfers, and tax services. They operate store locations across multiple states, though specific availability varies by location and state regulations. The website indicates that certain loan products are state-restricted, with Colorado locations showing limited availability for some offerings. ACE markets itself primarily to consumers seeking emergency cash solutions and alternative financial services outside traditional banking channels.

ACE differentiates itself through its multi-service physical presence and breadth of offerings beyond basic payday loans. The company maintains dedicated customer service lines and has invested in online loan operations alongside traditional storefront services. Their tax services and money transfer capabilities position them as a broader financial services alternative rather than a single-product lender. The company also maintains privacy compliance practices, with specific California resident disclosures available on their site.

Based on the available information, ACE Cash Express serves consumers in financial emergencies but operates within a heavily regulated industry where product availability is severely restricted by state law—as evidenced by the 'this type of loan is not available in this state' messages on their site. While their multi-service model offers convenience, consumers should verify which specific products are legally available in their state before applying. The company's reliance on physical locations may limit accessibility compared to fully digital competitors.
address: 115 I 35 N Frontage Rd #19, New Braunfels, TX 78130

company_info.headquarters: 115 I 35 N Frontage Rd #19, New Braunfels, TX 78130

pros: Multiple service offerings in one location: check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, installment loans, title loans, and tax services
Multiple contact channels available including phone (877-ACE-CASH, 866-ACE-CASH) and email support for different service types
Online loan application option available in addition to in-store services
Established multi-state presence with store locator tool on website
Dedicated customer service departments for general inquiries and internet operations
Offers emergency cash solutions marketed for same-day or next-day funding
Transparent about service availability by state, displaying clear restrictions on product offerings
cons: Many loan products are heavily restricted by state—specific locations show 'this type of loan is not available in this state' messages, limiting actual borrowing options
Website location pages return 404 errors, making it difficult to verify specific services available at individual store locations
No information provided about interest rates, APR, fees, or loan terms on the available website content
Physical store-based model limits 24/7 accessibility compared to fully digital competitors
Temporary store closures documented (New Orleans due to Hurricane Ida), suggesting operational vulnerability
best_for: Consumers needing check cashing or money transfer services who prefer in-person transactions
Individuals seeking tax preparation services combined with other financial services at one location
Emergency cash borrowers in states where ACE's installment and title loan products are legally available
Customers who prefer multiple service options (bill payment, money transfers, check cashing) at a single provider
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in states where their loan products are legally available who need multiple financial services (check cashing, money transfers, bill payment) combined with emergency cash options. The primary caveat is severe state-by-state regulatory restrictions on loan product availability—many locations explicitly block certain loan types, and website errors prevent verification of what's actually offered at specific stores.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
